_TEMPLATE_WARNING3: ██ This file is COPIED to user profiles, then the user's copy is used   ██
description: Canonical Trigger Manager configuration for finite work

memoryContentModeOptions.all: All content - includes both user messages and AI responses
memoryContentModeOptions.user: User only - reflects on user inputs, excluding verbose AI responses (recommended)
memoryContentModeOptions.agent: Agent only - reflects on AI responses, dreams, and system outputs

audio-organizer.description: Processes the audio inbox into transcripts and memories when explicitly requested.
audio-organizer.comment: Finite one-shot work. Never starts on boot and always receives a durable coordinator task id.

organizer.comment: Runs after 10 minutes of inactivity to avoid competing with user for VRAM

curator.comment: LLM-based memory curation - processes 5 memories per run after 10 minutes of user inactivity, loops every 10 minutes while inactive (uses 30B model with 5-minute timeout)

sleep-workflow.comment: Queues bounded dream and persona-review children through the work coordinator.

robot-observer.description: Requests a current robot camera image and runs a bounded Environment Mode observation cycle.
robot-observer.comment: Manual finite agent. Robot Operator may also submit it with autonomy source after its own inactivity conditions pass.

boredom-movement.description: Runs Environment Mode with the robot-advertised stationary movement catalog and permits one in-place semantic command.
boredom-movement.comment: Manual finite agent with no timer. Its dedicated configuration allowlist is intersected with the robot's advertised command catalog before Robot Operator may submit it autonomously in semi or full mode.

reflector.comment: 70% chance to reflect after 15 min of inactivity - not guaranteed, feels more organic

contentModeOptions.all: All content - includes both user messages and AI responses
contentModeOptions.user: User only - reflects on user inputs, excluding verbose AI responses (recommended)
contentModeOptions.agent: Agent only - reflects on AI responses, dreams, and system outputs

curiosity.comment: Triggers only after conversation inactivity. Threshold (900s = 15min) controlled by questionIntervalSeconds in curiosity.json.

curiosity-researcher.comment: Performs research on pending curiosity questions by searching memories and generating context notes. Processes one question per cycle.

inner-curiosity.comment: Generates self-directed questions and answers them using local memory. Saves as inner_dialogue (never shows in chat).

psychoanalyzer.comment: Manual-run agent that reviews recent memories with psychotherapist model and incrementally updates persona. Run via: ./bin/mh agent run psychoanalyzer

desire-generator.comment: Agency: Synthesizes desires from persona goals, tasks, memories, and conversation patterns. Reinforces existing desires when user expresses similar wants. Runs after 10 min of inactivity to process recent conversations.

desire-explorer.comment: Agency: Explores desires before planning - researches feasibility, generates smart context-aware questions. Runs every 2 minutes to process desires that crossed threshold.

desire-executor.comment: Agency: Executes approved desires through the operator system. Runs every 5 minutes.

desire-planner.comment: Agency: Generates plans for desires in 'planning' status using cognitive graphs. Runs every 5 minutes.

desire-outcome-reviewer.comment: Agency: Reviews completed/failed desires to determine next action (complete, retry, continue, escalate, abandon). Handles recurring/achievable/aspirational desire types differently. Runs every 10 minutes.

profile-sync.comment: Full profile synchronization with remote server. Handles: authentication, profile bundle download (persona/config), credentials sync, memory sync. Fully replaces client-side syncFromRemoteServer. Supports --pull-only, --memories-only, --profile-only, --days=N, --user=<username> flags.

memory-sync.comment: Syncs memories with remote server. Triggered manually via UI, on login (pull-only), or can be scheduled. Supports --pull-only, --push-only, and --user=<username> flags.

mood.description: Reviews recent conversation or inner dialogue and selects an enabled persona facet through the editable Mood Persona Review graph.
mood.comment: Disabled by default. When enabled, queues one Mood graph review after every 10 user messages. After 30 minutes without a conversation event, queues the same graph in baseline-reset mode.

auto-indexer.comment: Nightly vector index rebuild using Qwen3 embeddings. Runs on CPU via local-model-service (parallel to GPU backends). Skips rebuild if index is < 24 hours old.

daydreamer.comment: 15% chance to generate a brief daydream after 5 min idle. Inner dialogue only - never surfaces to main chat. Lighter than full dreams.
